svg.text: AltTab — switch the current app windows
YouTube — jump to chapter to the left
YouTube — previous chapter in current video
YouTube — jump to chapter to the right
Fork — toggle Force Push on Push dialog
Finder — go to Downloads (⇧⌘L) HAMMERSPOON CUSTOM
Mail — open a new Mail viewer window
YouTube — previous chapter in current video
